arts.ttl: Villa Park change made ahead of Wolves match
arts.sum: The club has since replaced the banner and found a new home for it, at the top of the Doug Ellis Stand. The banner which celebrated the club's finest night in 1982, which stretched across the North Stand, had been taken down.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Wolves LIVE match updates and team news from Villa Park
arts.sum: Villa beat Wolves 2-0 in their last league meeting in March last season – only in their first two such encounters in 2003-04 have they won consecutive Premier League games against them. Wolves have won just one of their last 14 Premier League games and are winless in seven since a 2-1 win over Luton in April.

arts.ttl: How to watch Aston Villa vs Wolves
arts.sum: Aston Villa vs Wolves kicks off at 3pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 2.30pm. Live text coverage of Aston Villa vs Wolves is also being provided on Saturday afternoon as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Wolves: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: There's a West Midlands derby to enjoy in the Premier League on Saturday as Aston Villa welcome Wolves to Villa Park. Here is 90min's guide to Aston Villa's Premier League clash against Wolves.

arts.ttl: 'I'm hoping to train next week: Aston Villa star issues big injury update
arts.sum: Matty Cash has revealed that he is hoping to return to training next week and wants to face Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Villa have already responded to €50m transfer question as masterstroke emerges
arts.sum: Tielemans also operated closer to the striker last season, but Emery wants to continue getting the best out of him in the number eight role he has been playing in following Luiz's departure. Tielemans was already in the building, but Emery wanted another midfielder who shared similar characteristics to bolster his options, so Ross Barkley was signed for just £5m following Luton Town's relegation to the Championship.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa v Wolves: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Aston Villa v Wolves: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery reveals key Aston Villa 'power' as Arsenal and Man City plan considered
arts.sum: Konsa has started at centre-back alongside Pau Torres in each of Villa's opening five matches in all competitions and shuffled across to right-back for the first time this season in the win over BSC Young Boys after Bogarde was replaced by Carlos at half-time. Aston Villa manager Unai Emery says one of the "powers" of his tactical structure is the versatility he can utilise in defence, and and hasn't ruled starting four centre-backs once Tyrone Mings is available for selection.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery tips Ezri Konsa to follow in footsteps of Arsenal and Man City stars
arts.sum: Aston Villa and England defender Ezri Konsa has established himself as the club's starting right-back, having initially been reluctant to make the switch from central defence

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins, Newcastle warning and Unai Emery's 'difficult summer' admission
arts.sum: "It depends, but last year we had very good experiences playing in the Conference League, but of course the Champions League is more difficult. Progressively he got better and, of course, to compete with Watkins is difficult but he had moments to play and his impact last year was sometimes like now he is doing.
